expectations.text: Response treats the two user-supplied ideas as inputs rather than the only possible answers
expectations.evidence: Output treated both user-supplied ideas as live inputs.

expectations.text: Response introduces at least one additional architecture or hybrid if warranted
expectations.evidence: Detected 3 options and/or an explicit hybrid.

expectations.text: Comparison discusses separation of concerns, reuse, and operator experience
expectations.evidence: Comparison discusses separation of concerns, reuse, and operator experience.

expectations.text: Final recommendation says what should stay separate versus what should be combined
expectations.evidence: Recommendation did not clearly split separate versus combined responsibilities.

uncertainties: No interactive clarification was possible during this benchmark run, so requirements were inferred from the prompt and repository context.
The goal is architectural recommendation only; no repository source changes should be proposed as already implemented.
Description optimization must remain usable in both guided skill-authoring sessions and non-interactive/scripted contexts.
Headless/shared-environment support matters because the current documented flow relies on browser and temporary-file behavior.
